recent_calls.summary: The user called to inquire about a heating and cooling appointment for a residential property managed by their company. The agent gathered necessary details and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance due to the urgency expressed by the user. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user, Chance Gaston, called to inquire about an ETA for a service at Vivian but had no appointment found in the system. The user decided to have someone else call instead of leaving a message or being transferred. The call ended without further action.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called after receiving a missed call regarding a recent service related to heating and cooling. The agent attempted to assist but the user requested to speak with someone else, leading to a transfer to a live agent.

Lorraine called to schedule a routine furnace cleaning covered by her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the appointment details for the morning of Monday, April 21st, and Lorraine declined additional information about maintenance programs. The call ended positively with Lorraine providing excellent feedback on the agent's service.

Preston Gear called to report that his AC is not working and requested a service appointment. The agent attempted to confirm details but made errors in the summary, leading Preston to request transfer to a live agent for further assistance. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent.

Brad called to schedule a routine AC tune-up and initially requested Friday, April 17th, but was informed the earliest available slots were on April 20th. He then requested Friday, April 24th at 8 AM. The agent attempted to confirm the new date but was unable to finalize the booking and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Chamille called to inquire about the technician's appointment time for her furnace service. The agent initially found an appointment scheduled for April 20th but Chamille corrected it to April 15th. The agent assured Chamille that the team would review and update the appointment details and reach out to her.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent who could assist further.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user, Candace, called back and the agent, Sophie, attempted to connect her with a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another agent.

The user, Latra Mauser, called to request cooling system service under their American Home Shield home warranty due to a smell when the system runs. The agent collected the dispatch number, service address, and contact information, confirmed the details, and the user rated the experience positively. The call ended with the user providing feedback and no further issues.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called back in response to a message and informed the agent that they had canceled the service call. The agent then transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called back to schedule an AC tune-up under their American Home Shield home warranty plan. The agent confirmed the details, including the earliest available appointment and the request for a filter change, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user returned a call and the agent attempted to connect them with a live agent by transferring the call. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another live agent successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to confirm the time of a scheduled cooling service appointment on April 20th. The agent verified the user's details and informed them that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out to confirm the appointment time. The user expressed mild interest in maintenance programs and provided feedback rating the AI assistant a 3, preferring to speak with a real person.

Chad Hughes called to schedule an AC service appointment through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the issue with the outside unit not turning on and collected all necessary details, including the dispatch number. Chad declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the AI assistant.

The user called to confirm an appointment they believed was already scheduled and clarified that no further action was needed. The agent confirmed the appointment was set and offered further assistance, which the user declined. The call ended amicably with no issues.

The user called back to schedule a home warranty service appointment for their AC not working. The agent collected the dispatch number, service address, and contact phone number, and confirmed the details with the user. The user was informed that the appropriate team would reach out shortly to assist with scheduling.

The user, Emmanuel from American Home Shield, requested to speak to a live agent and the call was successfully transferred to another agent. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and facilitated the transfer promptly.
Fabian Douglas called back after receiving a call from the number. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the call and transferred Fabian to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Tyrone Robinson, called to schedule a service appointment for their AC unit which is not cooling. The agent provided available time slots for April 20th, and the user agreed to one of the options. The call ended with some unclear statements from the user.

Emmanuel from American Home Shield called Budget's virtual assistant Sophie to discuss a dispatch scheduled for April 25th, which the customer wanted to move to an earlier date due to a non-working air conditioner. Sophie was unable to provide available appointment dates and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent initiated the call and requested the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

The user called to follow up on a request made with American Home Shield and was connected to Budget for scheduling a repair or inspection. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user, Betsy, returned a call and the agent, Sophie, attempted to connect her with a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another agent.
The agent attempted to engage the user by requesting their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No further information was exchanged during the call.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called to follow up on a missed call regarding setting up their air service. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user hanging up immediately without any interaction.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to another agent to assist the user further.

The user called to inquire about who handles digital marketing for Budget Heating and Cooling. The agent informed the user that such inquiries are handled by the main office and provided contact details. The user acknowledged the information and ended the call.

Joseph called to discuss an estimate and concerns about American Home Shield coverage for his upstairs furnace, where only one of three burners was lighting. The agent confirmed details and arranged for a team member to follow up with him about the estimate and coverage, preferably the same day. Joseph declined information about maintenance programs but provided positive feedback about the call.

David from American Home Shield called to schedule a home warranty service appointment for replacing the refrigerant and thermostat on an AC unit. The appointment was requested for Wednesday at any time, and the agent confirmed all details including the service address and contact number. The call ended positively with the user providing excellent feedback about the agent's probing questions.

Kelly called to cancel her seasonal cleaning appointment scheduled for next Tuesday at her property in Chesterfield. She confirmed she is the owner and does not want to reschedule the appointment at this time. The agent confirmed the cancellation details and the call ended without further requests.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called and asked if someone could return the call. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Omar, called to schedule a regular summer AC check under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details, including the preferred time of Friday afternoon, and informed Omar that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him to confirm. Omar declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.

The user, Ariel from Hemlane, called to report a misdial from Budget's number and requested to be transferred to someone who could assist. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate live agent.

The user called to inquire about the refrigerant amount and cost for an AC service dispatch. The agent was unable to provide pricing details and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user called back after receiving a call from Budget and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The agent acknowledged the user's request and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Milton Guzman, a property manager, called to schedule a service appointment for a tenant's hot water tank that is not lighting. The agent successfully booked an appointment for Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 4 PM and collected all necessary details. The user provided positive feedback with a suggestion for improvement.
The user, Ariel from Hamline, called back after missing a call from Budget. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the callback and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
